title: Smaller Tools
description: A clean, minimalist theme that displays all tools in a smaller size.
body:
# Smaller Tools ⚒️ ![Mini Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9991a56164025a807f8cb300ee1d0ce346e08636.png) > **A clean, vanilla friendly Minecraft resource pack that makes tools smaller, sharper, and less distracting.** **Smaller Tools** redesigns Minecraft tools with a more compact shape, cleaner proportions, and refined pixel details, while still keeping the classic **vanilla look and feel**. It is made for players who want a cleaner screen, a more polished hotbar, and tools that feel less bulky when held in first person. Whether you are playing **Survival**, **PvP**, **building**, or simply prefer a more minimal style, **Smaller Tools** keeps everything familiar while making your tools look more compact and visually satisfying. --- ## Overview 📌 | Category | Details | |:--|:--| | **Edition** | Minecraft: Java Edition | | **Pack Type** | Resource Pack | | **Style** | Vanilla inspired | | **Changes** | Visual only | | **Dependencies** | None required | --- ## Features ✨ - [x] Smaller and slimmer tool textures - [x] Cleaner, more polished designs - [x] Vanilla inspired appearance - [x] Sharper and more refined pixel details - [x] Less visual clutter while holding tools - [x] Works without mods or dependencies - [x] No gameplay changes, only visual improvements --- ## Why use Smaller Tools? 🛠️ Smaller Tools is perfect for players who want: - A **cleaner first person view** - Tools that take up **less space on screen** - A resource pack that still feels **true to vanilla Minecraft** - A subtle visual upgrade without changing the game’s original identity In short: **~~Bulky and distracting tools~~ → Smaller, cleaner, and more polished tools.** --- ## Available Versions ✅ **Smaller Tools** is available for **Minecraft: Java Edition** in the following versions: | Minecraft Version | Supported | |:--:|:--:| | **1.21.x** | ✅ | | **1.20.x** | ✅ | | **1.8.x** | ✅ | | **1.7.x** | ✅ | ---
📦 Usage & Permissions You may use **Smaller Tools** in: - Modpacks - Videos - Screenshots - Personal resource pack setups As long as proper credit is given to **Yannis_** and this project is linked. Please do **not**: - Sell this pack - Monetize this pack directly - Reupload it elsewhere - Redistribute it as your own - Claim the textures as your own work without permission.
